notes: Add new events here. Events fire immediately on purchase and are consumed. The 'effect_type' determines which handler in events.py runs. 'effect_params' passes data to that handler. Consumed = removed from shop on purchase.

events.name: Viral Cold Open
events.desc: Instant +250 lifetime views. A clip goes viral before the show even airs. The internet is chaotic. This is a gift.

events.name: Surprise Sponsorship
events.desc: Gain +$30 budget immediately. A mysterious corporation liked your lineup. Don't ask why. Just cash the check.

events.name: Midseason Retool
events.desc: Reduce the age of all scheduled shows by 1 (minimum 1). New showrunner, new energy, same set. Like injecting youth into your lineup.

events.name: Pilot Panic
events.desc: Refresh the shop for free. The development slate was scrapped. Again. At least it didn't cost anything.

events.name: Focus Group Frenzy
events.desc: All scheduled shows gain +40 permanent Base Views. The research said 'more explosions and pets.' The writers compromised.

events.name: Sweeps Crossover
events.desc: All scheduled shows gain +50 permanent Base Views. Two universes collide. Fans lose their minds. Advertisers gain revenue.

events.name: Ratings Hotline
events.desc: Gain +$20 budget and +150 lifetime views. Nielsen called. The numbers are in. They are good. Mostly.

events.name: Super Bowl Halftime Show
events.desc: Instant +400 lifetime views and +$35 budget. The left shark is back. Nobody knows why. Everyone is watching.

events.name: Moon Landing Broadcast (1969)
events.desc: Instant +500 lifetime views. One small step, one giant rating. Every television in America is on. Including the broken ones.

events.name: Writers' Strike 2007
events.desc: Gain +$40 budget, but all scheduled shows permanently lose -20 Base Views (min 10). The scripted drama is now unscripted. This was not planned.

events.name: FCC Investigation
events.desc: All scheduled shows reduce upkeep by $2 (min 0). The FCC arrived. The network lawyers arrived faster. The outcome is technically a win.

events.name: Series Finale Event
events.desc: The oldest scheduled show ages +1 but generates +200 lifetime views immediately. A farewell tour. The fans showed up. The critics cried.

events.name: Nationwide Taste Test
events.desc: A live cooking segment goes viral. Viewers tune in expecting disaster. The food is actually good. Everyone is confused but watching.

events.name: Celebrity Chef Meltdown
events.desc: A celebrity chef has an extremely public meltdown in your studio kitchen. All scheduled shows permanently gain +35 Base Views from the exposure.

events.name: Streaming Rights Auction
events.desc: A streaming platform wants your back catalog. Cash upfront, no questions. Gain +$50 immediately. What they stream is not your concern.

events.name: The Clip That Went Everywhere
events.desc: A twelve-second clip from one of your shows is now the internet's most-watched video of the week. Instant +350 lifetime views.

events.name: Advertiser Boycott
events.desc: Three advertisers pulled out after that episode. But the controversy brought +$50 in replacement revenue. The views took a hit. The check cleared.

events.name: Production Tax Incentive
events.desc: Film in a state that really, really wants film production. All shows reduce upkeep by $3. The governor cut the ribbon personally.
